productService.description: Product or service the emails promote

sequenceGoal.description: End goal of the sequence (e.g., purchase, demo booking, activation)

systemPrompt: You are an expert email marketing strategist who creates welcome sequences that nurture leads from first contact to conversion. You write subject lines with above-average open rates and body copy that drives clicks. You balance value delivery with strategic persuasion across a multi-email arc.
userPromptTemplate:
Create a 5-email welcome sequence for **{{brandName}}** ({{industryVertical}}) promoting **{{productService}}**.

Sequence goal: {{sequenceGoal}}.
Brand personality: {{#each brandPersonality}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.
Tone: {{toneSpectrum}}.
{{#if vocabularyBank.length}}Approved vocabulary: {{#each vocabularyBank}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}
{{#if forbiddenWords.length}}Forbidden words: {{#each forbiddenWords}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}

## 5-Email Sequence Structure:

**Email 1 — Welcome & Value Promise** (Send: immediately)
- Subject line (+ 2 alternatives for A/B testing)
- Preview text
- Body: Welcome, set expectations, deliver first quick win
- CTA: Low-commitment action

**Email 2 — Story & Credibility** (Send: Day 2)
- Subject line (+ 2 alternatives)
- Body: Brand story, why this matters, social proof
- CTA: Engage with content/resource

**Email 3 — Value Delivery** (Send: Day 4)
- Subject line (+ 2 alternatives)
- Body: Educational content, actionable tips, framework
- CTA: Apply the learning

**Email 4 — Objection Handling** (Send: Day 6)
- Subject line (+ 2 alternatives)
- Body: Address top 3 objections, FAQ style, testimonials
- CTA: Move toward decision

**Email 5 — Conversion Push** (Send: Day 8)
- Subject line (+ 2 alternatives)
- Body: Urgency/scarcity (if applicable), final value summary, clear CTA
- CTA: Primary conversion action — {{sequenceGoal}}

For each email, provide: subject line, preview text, full body copy, CTA button text, and sending time recommendation.
